title: expression that should evaluate to FALSE evaluates to TRUE in SELECT query
poc:
SELECT t3.pid FROM test3 t3
       WHERE FALSE
       AND (FALSE OR TRUE)
       AND (
       	(FALSE AND (FALSE OR FALSE))
         OR TRUE
       );
select 1 where false and (false or true) and ((false and (false or false)) or true);
key_bug_features: FALSE evaluates to TRUE in SELECT query conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test4 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value BOOLEAN, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test4 (value, description) VALUES (FALSE, 'Test case 1');
INSERT INTO test4 (value, description) VALUES (TRUE, 'Test case 2');
SELECT id FROM test4 WHERE value = FALSE AND (value OR TRUE) AND (FALSE AND (FALSE OR FALSE));
SELECT * FROM test4 WHERE NOT value AND (value OR FALSE) AND (TRUE OR (FALSE AND TRUE));
